enriched_points.expanded_content: Research into innovative rehabilitation therapies is crucial for addressing the diverse symptoms of post-COVID-19 conditions, enhancing recovery through tailored interventions like cognitive and physical therapies.

Collaborative efforts among healthcare providers, academic institutions, and research organizations are vital for developing evidence-based rehabilitation strategies and sharing successful treatment modalities for long COVID.

Increased funding for rehabilitation programs is essential to support comprehensive treatments, improve patient outcomes, and facilitate research into effective interventions for long-term COVID-19 recovery.
